characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Adrenaline Makeover: At the start after declaring war on the F4, she takes down her braids and wears her hair down for the rest of the series. All of the Other Reindeer: As a family that moves from middle class to extremely poor, she tends to get a lot of flack at a school where its normal for students to go on field trips to Hawaii. Break the Cutie: She goes through this over the course of the series, but herPlucky Girlnature tends to win out over despair in the end. Brainy Brunette: She actually got into Eitoku due to her own book smarts. Catchphrase: Tsukushi's "Unbelievable!" ("Arienai-tsu no!")

characters.name: Makino Tsukushi
characters.description: Adrenaline Makeover: At the start after declaring war on the F4, she takes down her braids and wears her hair down for the rest of the series. All of the Other Reindeer: As a family that moves from middle class to extremely poor, she tends to get a lot of flack at a school where its normal for students to go on field trips to Hawaii. Break the Cutie: She goes through this over the course of the series, but herPlucky Girlnature tends to win out over despair in the end. Brainy Brunette: She actually got into Eitoku due to her own book smarts. Catchphrase: Tsukushi's "Unbelievable!" ("Arienai-tsu no!")

characters.name: Tsukasa Domyoji
characters.description: The Big Guy: Definitely this. When in bad mood (and it happens often) he's willing to punch anyone in his path. Crazy Jealous Guy: Since Tsukushi is hisfirst and only love, he's rather clingy. Crouching Moron, Hidden Badass: He's such an enormous ditz that even the characters around him can forget how dangerous he can be when he gets serious. Disappeared Dad. Mr. Doumyouji is pretty much nonexistant for all that we know. The Ditz: As hisRunning Gaginvolvingmalapropismswould tell, he's utterlyignorant as he is sheltered.

characters.name: Rui Hanazawa
characters.description: Did Not Get the Girl:Twice. Dub Name Change: In the 2004 Italian dub of the anime he was renamed "Rupert Atkins", the Italian version of the manga however retains his original Japanese name. Elegant Classical Musician: Gifted violin player. No Social Skills: Blunt and aloof; he doesn't seem to understand many social cues. The Quiet One: It's what caught Makino's attention at first. As he would rather keep to himself rather than partake in the cruelty and foolishness of the rest of the F4.

characters.name: Akira Mimasaka
characters.description: Dub Name Change: In the 2004 Italian dub of the anime he was renamed "Alexander Motters", the Italian version of the manga however retains his original Japanese name. Heterosexual Life-Partners: With Soujiro. Likes Older Women: He likes his ladies older, since his mother isOne of the Kids. Team Dad: A rather sui-generis case. He doesn't particularly care about forcing morality on the group (and probably couldn't if he wanted to) but is the general mediator for conflicts and seems to take it upon his shoulders when the group isn't getting along, eventually leading to him getting in a fistfight with Tsukasa when the latter won't stop stirring up drama with Rui. Yakuza Prince: Specifically, in the live action.

characters.name: Soujiro Nichikado
characters.description: The Casanova: Attracts by far the most women in F4, but only two women have ever had his heart. Dub Name Change: In the 2004 Italian dub of the anime he was renamed "Nathan Montgomery", the Italian version of the manga however retains his original Japanese name. The Dutiful Son: He serves this purpose in his family; his oldest brother left to become a doctor and is considered the black sheep of the family, while Soujirou stayed behind to train to take charge of his family's tea ceremony enterprise. However, while he's not the protagonist, he's a far more important character than his never-seen brother, and is a flagrant hedonist and womanizer. Heterosexual Life-Partners: With Akira. Relationship Upgrade: In the 2018 Chinese version, he ends up in a happy relationship with Xiaoyu, the Chinese verison of Yuki.

characters.name: Yuuki Matsuoka
characters.description: Better as Friends: With Soujiro. Important Haircut: After she helps Soujiro find closure and see the message his first love wanted to show him, she cuts her hair and states that she's thinking about falling in love again. Ship Tease: Again, with Soujiro.

characters.name: Makiko Endou
characters.description: Adaptation Expansion: She's given a more prominent role in the anime, and appears throughout the story as a supportive friend to Tsukushi. Broken Bird: For such a shy and sweet girl, she's very cynical about Eitoku as a whole. Shrinking Violet: She's quite shy and timid, not having it in her to stand up for herself, or Tsukushi for that matter, when targetted by the F4. What Happened to the Mouse?: In the manga, after secretly returning Tsukushi's desk as an apology for not having the courage to stand up for her, she disappears from the story and never shows up again.

characters.name: Shizuka Todou
characters.description: Cool Big Sis: She's elegant, kind, strong-willed, and everyone looks up to her. Makino describes her as angelic. Important Haircut:To prove that she's serious into retiring from showbiz to become a lawyer, she cuts off her long dark hair. Nice Girl: Unlike some of the other popular students, she's nice to Tsukushi despite her conflict with F4 and helped clean her up. She even defended her on the summer trip when Yuriko, Minako, and Erika were badmouthing her and lent a dress for the party on the yacht.

characters.name: Sakurako Sanjou
characters.description: Bitch in Sheep's Clothing: She comes across as a sweet, skittish girl who admires Tsukushi, howeverit's revealed to be a front as part of her plan to take revenge on Tsukasa and the F4 for bullying her when she was younger. Disproportionate Retribution:She does all kinds of horrible things to Tsukushi... to obtain herrevengeon Tsukasa, who bullied her and called her ugly as a child. False Friend:She's this to Tsukushi at first, only using her as a means to get revenge on Tsukasa and the rest of the F4. Good Is Not Nice: While she does come to deeply care for Tsukushi, she isnota kind person. She is more than happy to engage in cruelty toward those she doesn't like. Such as suggesting the group dangles Yuriko and her gang outside in below freezing tempurature as punishment for bullying Tsukushi on their trip to Canada. I Am Not Pretty: Feels unattractive even tough she's really pretty. To the extent ofgetting plastic surgery because Tsukasa relentlessly bullied her due to being merely plain in looks.At age 16.

characters.name: Kaede Domyouji
characters.description: Abusive Parents: To both Tsubaki and Tsukasa. It says a lot when we see that she's the ONLY person who terrifies the plucky Tsubaki into submission. Arranged Marriage: Ropes Tsubaki into one, and wants to do that to Tsukasa and Shigeru. Parental Marriage Veto: She does this successfully to Tsubaki, not wanting her to be in a relationship with an ordinary office worker. And attempts it again to Tsukasa, as she disapproves of her son being in a relationship with a common girl.

characters.name: Tsubaki Domyouji
characters.description: Arranged Marriage: As her mother disapproved of her relationship with her high-school sweetheart due to his working-class background, she was arranged into a marriage with a more "suitable" (and financially beneficial) partner: the heir to a hotel empire. While she eventually came to love her husband, she forever held a candle for her first love. Cool Big Sis: She's this to Tsukasa, and she serves this role for Tsukushi as well, being a cool, stylish, and mature figure who supports Tsukushi in her relationship with Tsukasa and only wants to see her happy. Parental Marriage Veto: We learn she used to date a working-class boy and her mom put an end to their relationship by threatening to shut down the company being run by the father of the boy. Perfectly Arranged Marriage: Despite her many attempts to protest and run away, she admits that she eventually fell for her to-be-husband due to his gentle and kind nature, and his promise to be there for her, even if the entire world were against her.

characters.name: Shigeru Ookawahara
characters.description: Arranged Marriage: With Tsukasa. She does sorta like him, but is aware that he loves Tsukushi. Boyish Short Hair: She has her hair extremely short and has a very tomboyish and outspoken personality. I Want My Beloved to Be Happy: To both TsukasaandTsukushi. She really did love Tsukasa but she absolutely adores her rival in love, Tsukushi, as well. When she's rejected, she decides to support the two of them and help them get together. Manic Pixie Dream Girl: Shigeru tries to become one of these for Tsukasa, however he ultimately makes it clear that he doesn't like her that way. Shipper on Deck: For Tsukasa and Tsukushi. After she is rejected she decides to cheer the two of them on and support their relationship.

characters.name: Yuriko Asai, Minako Yamano, and Erika Ayuhara
characters.description: Alpha Bitches: A wholeGirl Posseof them. Green-Eyed Monster: The reason they target Tsukushi, as they're jealous and feel that a common girl like her is unworthy of the attention and friendship she receives from the F4. Hypocrite: They spend every walking moment tormenting Tsukushi, but are quick to feel offended when she retaliates with the same harm they’ve given her. Karma Houdini: No matter how much they bully Tsukushi, they usually get off scott-free, but the rare occasions they do get punished is a great sight to see. Satellite Characters: Their whole gig is about them bullying Tsukushi due to jealousy over the F4.

characters.name: Urara-sensei
characters.description: Canon Foreigner: Only appears in the anime. Cloudcuckoolander: Though, if you pay some attention to her rants,you may find some useful advice.
